# caveui — docs & gallery

> The caveui docs site is a static Next.js gallery (shadcn/uiverse-style) for browsing copy-friendly Jetpack Compose components. It has a landing page, component categories with live previews and copy-paste Kotlin, documentation sections, and prebuilt blocks. No account, no backend — every component is source you copy and own.

Repository: https://github.com/Jumnert/CaveUI

## Docs

- [Introduction](/docs/introduction): What caveui is and why it exists.
- [Installation](/docs/installation): Get a caveui component into your Jetpack Compose project.
- [Theming](/docs/theming): Design tokens — color, typography, shapes and spacing.
- [CLI](/docs/cli): Add components from the terminal with `npx caveui`.
- [RTL](/docs/rtl): Right-to-left layout support in Jetpack Compose.
- [Skills](/docs/skills): Agent skills that scaffold and review caveui components.
- [MCP Server](/docs/mcp-server): Expose the caveui registry to AI tools over MCP.
- [Registry](/docs/registry): How components are described and served to the gallery and CLI.
- [Forms](/docs/forms): Compose forms with caveui inputs and buttons.
- [Changelog](/docs/changelog): Notable changes to caveui.

## Components

- [All components](/components): Browse the full catalog by category.
- [Buttons](/components/buttons): Actions in every emphasis, state and animation.
- [Cards](/components/cards): Surfaces for grouping content.
- [Inputs](/components/inputs): Text fields, search, password and more.
- [Badges](/components/badges): Status, counts and labels.
- [Toggles](/components/toggles): Switches and segmented controls.
- [Loaders](/components/loaders): Spinners, bars, skeletons and dots.
- [Icons](/components/icons): Animated icons ready for Compose.
- [Checks](/components/checks): Checkboxes with check & fill animations.
- [Choices](/components/choices): Radio groups and segmented selectors.
- [Hints](/components/hints): Tooltips and popovers.
- [Avatars](/components/avatars): Avatars with rings, status and stacks.
- [Disclosures](/components/disclosures): Accordions and collapsibles.
- [Sliders](/components/sliders): Value sliders, ranges and steppers.
- [Selects](/components/selects): Selects, comboboxes and dropdown pickers.
- [Overlays](/components/overlays): Dialogs, drawers, sheets and popovers.
- [Navigation](/components/navigation): Nav bars, tabs, breadcrumbs and pagination.
- [Feedback](/components/feedback): Alerts, toasts, progress and empty states.
- [Menus](/components/menus): Dropdown, context and menu bars.
- [Pickers](/components/pickers): Calendars and date pickers.
- [Charts](/components/charts): Animated bars, lines and sparklines.
- [Command](/components/command): Command palette and quick search.

## Blocks

- [Blocks](/blocks): Prebuilt, full-screen layouts assembled from caveui components.

## Optional

- [README](https://github.com/Jumnert/CaveUI/blob/main/README.md): Monorepo overview and the Android library.
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/Jumnert/CaveUI/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to add a new component.
